{"action":"sql","sql":"WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT sub_id, evt_typ_cd, mrr_amt, evt_dt,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sub_id ORDER BY evt_dt DESC, evt_id DESC) AS rn
  FROM sub_evt
)
SELECT SUM(mrr_amt) AS current_mrr
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1 AND evt_typ_cd <> 'CANCEL';","reason":null}
